home.confirmRemovePlace: Remove this place from your favorites?
home.missingMapboxToken: NEXT_PUBLIC_MAPBOX_TOKEN is missing — the basemap won't load.

newTrip.loading: AI is planning your trip, ~10–20 seconds…
newTrip.successMessage: Generated a {count}-stop, ~{hours}-hour itinerary based on your preferences. Tell me how to tweak it in the chat on the right.

tripDetail.notFound: Trip not found — it may have been deleted.
tripDetail.partialMapWarning: Map shows only {visible}/{total} stops — others have no coordinates yet (backend hasn't returned lat/lng for them).

places.emptyBody1: Send IG Reels / Threads links to the Line account,
places.emptyBody2: or just send a place name — it'll show up here automatically.

recommend.needPlaces: Save at least 1 place so the AI can recommend ones you might like.
recommend.filterEmpty: No recommendations in this category yet.

trips.emptyBody: Tap above to generate your first trip from dates, budget, and preferences.

legal.label: 🛡️ Licensed
legal.tip: Matched against the registered legal hotel list

illegal.label: ⚠️ Likely unlicensed
illegal.tip: May have fire-safety risks; consider a licensed hotel

aiChat.subheader: Tell the AI in natural language how to tweak this itinerary
aiChat.empty: No messages yet. Try a quick prompt below or type your own.
aiChat.placeholder: e.g. Move the cafe near Fujin Street

quickPrompts.compact: Itinerary is too tiring, trim to 4 stops

tripWizard.title: Create a new trip
tripWizard.dietOtherPlaceholder: Describe other dietary needs, e.g. low-GI, gluten-free, no beef...
tripWizard.dietExtraPlaceholder: Extra notes (allergies, no spice, no scallion/garlic...)

lucky.label: 🎲 Feeling lucky
lucky.explain: Let the AI randomize pace, transport, district and theme — you just go.
lucky.applied: Randomized into the preferences below; tweak as you like.

tripWizard.transportRequired: Pick at least one transport mode
tripWizard.expectation: Anything you want to tell the AI
tripWizard.expectationPlaceholder: e.g. lunch in Da'an, then a cafe to write at in the afternoon...
tripWizard.mustVisitHint: AI auto-picks from your saved & recommended places — only check the ones that absolutely must be in. Leaving them all unchecked is fine.
tripWizard.mustVisitEmpty: No saved places yet. Go to the home page and add some via Line first.
tripWizard.luckyMixNote: Lucky or not, the AI will mix in some recommended places to enrich the trip.

tripMap.noStops: This trip has no locatable stops
